title: elytrigia armena
intro: Elytrigia armena, also known as Armenian couch grass or Armenian wildrye, is a perennial plant species belonging to the grass family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and various other ailments, due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Elytrigia armena include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural diuretic, making it a popular remedy in traditional medicine. Elytrigia armena is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some cases, its roots are used to make a powder or tincture for medicinal purposes.
